title: Göteborg Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Göteborg, with a Z-Score of -4.14. This event has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Göteborg are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The low temperatures, combined with high humidity and moderate winds, are exacerbating the situation. 
 The city's energy demand is expected to increase, as residents try to stay warm, with 15.5 GG of heating degree days (HDD) forecasted.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
